summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Saudi Visa Office static website. All major features tested: navigation, professions search/filter/print, calculator, blog system, service pages, legal pages, and responsive design. All tests passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Website is well-structured with proper RTL support for Arabic
All pages have proper SEO meta tags and structured data
Responsive design works well on mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px)
WhatsApp floating button present on all pages for easy contact
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a static HTML/CSS/JS website for a Saudi visa office in Jordan. All files are served from /app/frontend/public/. Key pages tested: index.html (homepage), professions.html (585 professions with search/filter/print), calculator.html (visa fee calculator), blog.html & post.html (blog system), certificates.html, professional.html (service pages), terms.html, privacy.html, disclaimer.html (legal pages). All navigation links, footer links, back buttons, and interactive features work correctly.

homepage.details: Hero section displays correctly, navigation links work, footer with legal links present

professions_page.details: 585 professions loaded, search works (tested with 'مهندس'), filter dropdown works, 'الأوراق المطلوبة' modal opens with print/PDF/contact buttons

calculator_page.details: 3 select dropdowns, 4 checkboxes, calculate button works, shows estimated cost (70-90 دينار for test case)

blog_system.details: 6 blog articles displayed, clicking article navigates to post.html with full content, back to blog link works

service_pages.details: certificates.html and professional.html load correctly with back buttons and WhatsApp contact

legal_pages.details: terms.html, privacy.html, disclaimer.html all load correctly with back to home links

footer_links.details: Privacy, Terms, Disclaimer links in footer all navigate correctly

responsive_design.details: Tested on Mobile (390x844), Tablet (768x1024), Desktop (1920x1080) - all viewports display correctly
